isolation.sharedChecks: Parent validator already owns the shared build/lint checks for the js-and-advanced milestone, so they were reused here instead of being rerun in this flow validator.

assertions.title: Loop lookups use Map instead of find
assertions.reason: The targeted loop-nested `.find()` patterns were replaced with pre-built `Map`/`Set` lookups that are constructed once before iteration and consumed with `.get()` inside the loop bodies.

steps.action: Inspect the files called out by the feature metadata and scrutiny review for pre-built lookup structures
steps.expected: Targeted `.find()` calls inside `.map()` / `.filter()` loops should be replaced by `Map` or equivalent O(1) lookup patterns.
steps.observed: The touched field helpers, PDF generation code, and envelope editor/embed files build lookup maps before the loop and read them with `.get()` during iteration.

steps.action: Search the targeted server-only scope for remaining loop-nested `.find()` patterns
steps.expected: No remaining `.find()` inside `.map()` / `.filter()` callbacks in the targeted refactor scope.
steps.observed: Searches in `packages/lib/server-only/field`, `packages/lib/server-only/envelope`, and `packages/lib/server-only/pdf` returned no remaining matches for `.find()` inside targeted loop callbacks.

evidence.sharedChecks: Parent validator already owns the shared build/lint checks for the js-and-advanced milestone, so they were reused here instead of being rerun in this flow validator.

assertions.title: Chained filter/map combined into single iterations
assertions.reason: The touched data-transformation paths now use single-pass `.flatMap()` iterations instead of chained `.filter().map()` calls, and the inspected touched files no longer contain the prior chained pattern.

steps.action: Inspect the files listed by the feature commit and scrutiny review for single-pass iteration replacements
steps.expected: Eligible chained `.filter().map()` transformations should be consolidated into `.flatMap()` or equivalent single-iteration logic.
steps.observed: The touched server, signing, UI, and tRPC files use `.flatMap()` for the previously chained transformations, including field mapping, audit-log tuple creation, checkbox value extraction, and option list generation.

steps.action: Check the touched files for remaining chained `.filter().map()` transformations
steps.expected: The touched files should not retain the targeted chained transformation pattern.
steps.observed: The touched files still contain some standalone `.filter()` calls for non-targeted cases, but no remaining chained `.filter().map()` transformations were found in the inspected refactor scope.

evidence.sharedChecks: Parent validator already owns the shared build/lint checks for the js-and-advanced milestone, so they were reused here instead of being rerun in this flow validator.

summary: Validated 2 js-and-advanced assertions by read-only terminal inspection. VAL-JS-001 passed because the targeted loop-nested `.find()` patterns were replaced with pre-built Map/Set lookups, and VAL-JS-002 passed because the touched `.filter().map()` transformations were consolidated into single-pass `.flatMap()` iterations.
